name: LanguageTool
short_desc: Open-source grammar, style, and spell checker supporting 30+ languages
author: erikvl87
description: LanguageTool is an open-source grammar, style, and spell checker. It supports more than 30 languages and can be used as a self-hosted alternative to Grammarly. It provides an HTTP API that can be used with browser extensions, LibreOffice, and other integrations.

form_fields.label: Java Minimum Heap Size
form_fields.hint: Minimum heap size for the JVM (e.g. 256m, 512m, 1g)

form_fields.label: Java Maximum Heap Size
form_fields.hint: Maximum heap size for the JVM (e.g. 512m, 1g, 2g). Increase for better performance.
